case_title: CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. VS. JULIANA HABIB et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HABIB, JULIANA $4,071.99 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $983.79 INTEREST, $146.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,861.78, TOTAL JUDGMENT IS $5861.78, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
